summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new comment formatting functionality and preview endpoint. All new features working correctly including static analysis formatting, LLM comment handling, merged format parsing, severity sorting, score bar visualization, and authentication requirements.
passed_tests: POST /api/preview-comment with static analysis findings - properly formats markdown with severity headers, rule names, and code snippets
POST /api/preview-comment with empty comments list - returns clean 'no issues' message with checkmark
POST /api/preview-comment with LLM-style comments (body field only) - gracefully formats them in explanation section
POST /api/preview-comment with mixed severities - correctly sorts errors first, then warnings, then suggestions
POST /api/preview-comment markdown contains score bar visualization with filled/empty blocks
POST /api/preview-comment markdown contains summary text and stats line counting errors/warnings/suggestions
POST /api/preview-comment with merged format '[rule] explanation — suggestion' - correctly parses into separate sections
Full pipeline test: POST /api/analyze-cpp to get findings, then POST /api/preview-comment - integration working
All existing endpoints still work: login, webhook ping, stats, reviews, parse-diff, analyze-cpp
Authentication system working: login, logout, session management, brute force protection
C++ analyzer detecting all performance anti-patterns correctly
Diff parser handling multiple file types and formats correctly
